zh.lifeSummary: 當Isolda de Soligny於大約1179年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 辛特時，她的父親Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol36歲，母親Isolda Iseult Dol41歲。她於大約1189年與Richard de Prideaux在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Isolda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The name of the tragic mistress of Tristan in the Arthurian romances. There are several versions of the story. The main features are that the beautiful Isolde, an Irish princess, is betrothed to the aged King Mark of Cornwall. However, through accidentally drinking a magic potion, she and the young Cornish knight Tristan fall in love, with tragic consequences. The story has exercised a powerful hold on the European imagination. The name was relatively common in Britain in the Middle Ages, but is much rarer today.

en.lifeSummary: When Isolda de Soligny was born about 1179, in St Neot, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol, was 36 and her mother, Isolda Iseult Dol, was 41. She married Richard de Prideaux about 1189, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isolda de Soligny est née environ 1179, à St Neot, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Isolda Iseult Dol, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Prideaux environ 1189, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille.

Lei sposato Richard de Prideaux circa 1189, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Isolda de Solignyが約1179年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルスト ネオトで生まれた時，父Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dolは36歳，母Isolda Iseult Dolは41歳であった。約1189年にイギリスコルンワルでRichard de Prideauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Isolda de Soligny(이)가 대략 1179년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 니오트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isolda Iseult Dol(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 대략 1189년 영국 코른월에서 Richard de Prideaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isolda de Soligny родилась около 1179 г. в местности ст неот, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Isolda Iseult Dol, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Prideaux около 1189 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь.
